text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Military Family Service/Support Centers 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CHILD CARE AWARE OF AMERICA ARMED FORCES RESERVE CENTER FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICE MEMBER FAMILY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers navigation assistance in finding child care and child care expense assistance for military families. Programs vary depending on branch of service. 230 Geer Drive Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-4pm Email (800) 424-2246 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHILD CARE AWARE OF AMERICA SERVICE MEMBER FAMILY SUPPORT
